summary: Phase 4 Polymarket Edge OS Dashboard - All 20 features tested successfully. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 6 pages render correctly with full navigation, all components visible, and API integrations working.

issues: Minor ESLint warning: 'health' logical expression in useMemo dependencies - low priority

backend_api_tests: GET /status - Returns full state snapshot with strategies/risk/stats
GET /config - Returns trading config, risk, strategies, credentials
PUT /config - Mode change blocks without credentials
frontend_ui_tests: Sidebar renders with 6 navigation links (Overview, Arbitrage, Positions, Risk, Markets, Settings)
TopBar shows Engine STOPPED, Mode PAPER, Start button
WebSocket indicator shows 'Live' in sidebar
Engine Start/Stop button works correctly
Overview page: 6 stat cards (Daily PnL, Paper Balance, Win Rate, Total Trades, Open Positions, Markets Tracked)
Overview page: System Status section with component health
Overview page: Active Strategies section
Overview page: Feed Health section (Polymarket/Binance connected)
Overview page: Recent Trades table with empty state
Arbitrage page: 4 tabs (Opportunities, Rejected, Executions, Health) render and switch
Arbitrage page: 6 stat cards (Tradable, Rejected, Executed, Completed, Pairs Scanned, Last Scan)
Positions page: 3 tabs (Positions, Trades, Orders) render and switch
Positions page: 4 stat cards (Open Positions, Total Exposure, Unrealized P&L, Realized P&L)
Risk page: Kill switch button renders and works
Risk page: 3 risk gauges (Exposure, Position Slots, Daily Loss Limit)
Risk page: 4 sections (Risk Alerts, Risk Config, Component Health, Strategy Health)
Risk page: Kill switch banner appears/disappears on activate/deactivate
Markets page: 4 stat cards (Total Markets, Displayed, Total Volume, Avg Liquidity)
Markets page: Search input works
Markets page: Market table displays 200 markets with real data
Settings page: Trading mode buttons (Paper, Shadow, Live)
Settings page: Risk configuration form with 6 inputs
Settings page: Save risk config works via PUT /api/config
Settings page: Credentials display (Polymarket, Telegram)
Settings page: Strategy config shows Structural Arbitrage parameters
Navigation between all 6 pages works without console errors

seed_data_creation: None - uses live market data from Polymarket API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 dashboard is fully functional. All 6 pages (Overview, Arbitrage, Positions, Risk, Markets, Settings) work correctly. WebSocket pushes state updates every 2s. Engine Start/Stop, Kill Switch, and Risk Config Save all integrated with backend APIs. Markets page shows 200 real Polymarket markets. Minor ESLint warning in Risk.jsx about useMemo dependencies - can be fixed but not critical.
